title: selliguea ferrea
intro: Selliguea ferrea, also known as the iron fern or the Selaginella, is a type of plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Selliguea ferrea include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory function, and act as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea, capsules, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
